course_description.overview: Poland's largest road cycling sportive on the Baltic coast through the Tricity area (Gdynia, Gdansk, Sopot), featuring approximately 134 km of coastal and urban roads with moderate rolling terrain.

key_segments.name: Baltic Coast Stretch
key_segments.description: Flat to rolling roads along the scenic Baltic Sea coastline in the Tricity region.

key_segments.name: Urban Loop
key_segments.description: Passing through Gdynia and nearby cities with gentle undulations.

key_segments.name: Final Push
key_segments.description: Return to Gdynia with minor climbs totaling low elevation gain.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Accessible for amateurs with low elevation and coastal flats, suitable for a broad range of riders despite the long distance; not technically demanding.

logistics.getting_there: Fly into Gdansk Lech Walesa Airport (GDN), 20 km from Gdynia; trains and buses connect Tricity area efficiently.
logistics.accommodation: Hotels and hostels abundant in Gdynia, Gdansk, and Sopot; book early for summer event.
logistics.registration_details: Online registration via event site; early bird fees likely; unconfirmed date may affect openings.
logistics.bike_logistics: Bike rentals available in Tricity; fly with bike or ship via local services; roads fully closed for event.
logistics.local_considerations: Baltic coast weather variable in June (10-20°C); watch for wind; Poland uses PLN currency.

final_verdict.one_liner: Premier Baltic coast gran fondo for amateur cyclists seeking scenic, low-stress endurance riding.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Recreational riders, first-time gran fondo participants, and those prioritizing coastal beauty over climbs.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for Europeans or budget travelers; great value with stunning sea views and large local field.
pro_tips: Train for coastal winds and steady pacing on flats.
Combine with Tricity sightseeing in Gdansk/Sopot.
Register early as Poland's biggest sportive fills fast.
Pack layers for changeable June weather.
